Fillers
programme.desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors is played sequentially.

programme.title: Endraavathu Oru Naal
programme.desc: Thangamuthu, a farmer devoted to his cattle, enjoys a blissful life with his wife Rasathi until an unexpected calamity disrupts their rural harmony.

programme.title: Thalaivi
programme.desc: J Jayalalithaa, a prolific actress, is encouraged by her mentor, M G Ramachandran, to join politics. However, she faces a difficult challenge in the form of a male-dominated political environment.

programme.title: 35 Chinna Vishayam Ila
programme.desc: Homemaker Saraswathi's loving family faces a formidable challenge. Her elder son, Arjun, who struggles with Mathematics, must secure a passing score to remain in school, testing their bond.

programme.title: Maamanithan
programme.desc: A humble auto driver, desperate to improve the standard of education for his children, convinces a real estate agent that he will help him sell all his plots.

programme.title: Enai Noki Paayum Thota
programme.desc: Raghu's life takes a dramatic turn when he falls for Lekha, leading him into a world of love, betrayal and danger, as his relationship pulls him deeper into the underworld.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner, a genetics researcher with a tragic past, suffers an accident that causes him to transform into a raging green monster when he gets angry.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a barren island, a robot named Roz must rapidly adapt to the wild. It soon forms an unlikely parental bond with an orphaned gosling, finding connection in isolation.

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
programme.desc: When in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max, a wanderer, joins the rebel warrior Imperator Furiosa against his will in order to dethrone an autocrat who controls water supply to the land.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A betrayed Roman general comes back as a gladiator to avenge the murder of his relatives.

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
programme.desc: An underworld prince ignites a war against humanity to conquer Earth. Consequently, Hellboy and his squad must prevent him from unlocking a lethal army.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

programme.title: Rindu Awak Separuh Nyawa Ep26
programme.desc: Maisara naik hantu. Dia menolak, menampar dan menarik tudung Nurul Huda. Dia tidak peduli kalau Nurul Huda mahu mendapatkan Nazril, tapi bukan memburuk-burukkannya. Nazril pula menuduh Maisara bukan-bukan.

But the impetuous wolf-cub is far from perfect, and it's not easy getting to that "happy ending"! Luckily, he can count on the Narrator's help to learn from his mistakes.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S7 - EP 23
programme.desc: Imp devises a reality fashion television show, pitting the gang against each other in order to steal their tools. Can the gang stop their squabbling and stop the Imp? The Annual Ollipolis Air Race has begun again. Ollie and Ollicopter are determined to win just as their forefathers have. But when things go south, would they choose their legacy or losing it all for friendship?

Both sides are well positioned to have a strong run towards the post-season pl

programme.title: The Room
programme.desc: Ron is a travelling salesman who is superstitious. Each time he stays in a new hotel room, he would perform all steps needed to avoid offending any spirits, such as knocking the door and politely greeting the room before entering it. He would also cover any mirror that faces the bed. Yet, when he returns from a late-night dinner, the room still feels eerily strange.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 22
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 49
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 23
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 23
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. programme.desc: Hosted by Sam Tseng, Genie Chuo and professional chef James, with co-host Wu Bingcheng, this variety show features innovative cuisines designed to awe.

programme.title: Bittersweet Destiny Ep215
programme.desc: An accident leads to the murder of legendary chef Wanli, the disappearance of his daughter & the separation of his 4 disciples. Years later, a forgotten secret unravels the mystery behind everything.

programme.desc: A-Song, heir to a four-generation papercraft tradition, rediscovers purpose after meeting gifted apprentice A-Nuan, as love and creativity reshape their future together.

programme.desc: Taiwan's favourite host duo unite to take on various challenges against experts from a broad spectrum of fields in a showdown after intense down-to-earth training.

programme.desc: A health program combines interesting topics such as dream interpretation, Feng Shui & superstitions. The program invites doctors & experts to debunk online rumours and share practical health tips.

programme.title: Train Of Thoughts Ep15
programme.desc: Set in 1983 Tainan, this story follows a small-town train station where dreams begin and memories return. As people come and go, their lives reflect the bittersweet journeys of youth, family and hope.

programme.title: The Mother Of The Tofu Family Ep120

programme.desc: When a teenage girl disappears, the squad discovers a suspect who seems to be targeting young, vulnerable women with a similar personal connection; Dr. Huang delves into his past in order to help solve the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Chief McGrath's daughter discloses a sexual assault, Benson must balance the intricacies of the investigation with McGrath's impulsive actions.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a woman turns her husband in for possessing child pornography, the case is complicated by a sudden death; Benson tries to reconnect with a victim she saved.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson investigates a string of sexual assaults targeting local female psychiatrists; the squad celebrates a promotion.

programme.title: Everything on the Menu With Braun Strowman
programme.desc: The Monster takes on Manhattan, devouring critically acclaimed slices and Korean with Sal Vulcano.

programme.title: Everything on the Menu With Braun Strowman
programme.desc: Braun takes a revolutionary ride through Boston in search of lobster rolls and chowder.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The vicious assault of an Afghan diplomat's daughter uncovers clues that may suggest ancient traditions justify "honor killings" when a child goes against time-honored values.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The beating of a young man uncovers a dangerous male escort service where the boss may have reasons for sending her staff on potentially deadly dates.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An 18-year-old girl (Kelly Hutchinson) brings molestation charges against her father (Brian Kerwin) after therapy uncovers repressed memories of abuse, despite his claims that the allegations are false.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Stabler races against time to determine if a convicted man on death row also murdered and raped another victim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A boy, 5, is abducted from his bed in the middle of the night, prompting detectives to take a hard look at the boy's estranged father.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A military officer who was gang raped refuses to cooperate with the SVU for fear of damage to her reputation; Amaro asks his ex to help dig up information on the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Rollins tries to help a friend press rape charges against her lover, she finds herself thrust into the middle of the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU investigates when a woman claims a charismatic spiritual healer used hypnosis to incapacitate her and assault her.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a young woman is raped by a member of her church group, Barba argues that the First Amendment doesn't entitle a person to break the law.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a crucial witness in the case of a fatal hate crime against a Muslim family is deported, Barba must drop the charges against a suspect, resulting in rising tensions between communities on either side of the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The release of a suspect in a hate crime case leaves Benson and Barba caught between two families seeking justice; as public protests escalate to violence, Benson goes to desperate lengths to make an arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Fin crosses international borders to catch a fugitive rapist; a political tug-of-war derails Barba's legal case; shocking allegations against Benson lead to the return of an old friend.

programme.desc: Rollins and Carisi suspect a woman's bizarre rape story is fabricated; Benson goes on the offensive when her personal life is scrutinized.

programme.desc: A teenager disappears after schoolmates make her the subject of a vicious cyberbullying attack.

programme.desc: An old kidnapping case is reopened when a young woman is found wandering in Central Park; Carisi's conversation with a reporter puts him in hot water.

programme.desc: Benson must disclose the secrets of her past to help a rape victim recall the details of one terrible, traumatic night.

programme.desc: The cops get tangled in an elaborate online hoax that leads to the rape of a popular social media star; Benson sets new ground rules with Sheila.

programme.desc: Emotions run high as the squad embarks on a frantic search for Benson's missing son.

programme.desc: The SVU investigates a case involving two students in a special needs school; Rollins discovers that one child's medical issues stem from a surprising source.

programme.desc: An airline pilot accuses her captain of sexual assault; Fin makes sure Benson is protected at work.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep03
programme.desc: Jojo disedut ke dalam buku dan jumpa Didi. Disana terdapat Belalang serta semut-semut yang sibuk bersiap untuk musim sejuk. Belalang asyik bermain muzik; Didi, Jojo dan semut-semut terus mengumpul makanan.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep04
programme.desc: Akar menjalar terus membesar menutupi perpustakaan magikal. Sementara itu, Didi dan Jojo bertemu dengan Beruang si penggembala yang suka meminta tolong kerana kebosanan. Tiba-tiba, Serigala muncul.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep05
programme.desc: Aera terus membaca ketika akar perlahan-lahan merayap ke dalam perpustakaan. Sementara itu, Didi, Nana dan Jojo membina rumah, tetapi sebaik sahaja siap, Serigala tiba-tiba muncul di hadapan mereka.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep06
programme.desc: Aera disedut ke dalam buku sebagai Si Tudung Merah. Dia berangkat melawat Nek Kura tetapi bertemu dengan Serigala. Serigala segera menculik Nek Kura, menyamar sebagai dirinya, dan menunggu ketibaan Aera.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep07
programme.desc: Nana menyelamatkan Aera tetapi terperangkap dalam buku. Di dalamnya, dia bertemu seekor Tikus yang ditangkap oleh Singa. Nana cuba meredakan keadaan dan meyakinkan Singa untuk melepaskan Tikus itu.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep08
programme.desc: Jojo tersedut ke dalam buku dan bertemu Nana serta Rubah. Mereka lihat Singa mengumpan haiwan ke gua tanpa ada yang keluar. Curiga, mereka merancang misi menyelamat, namun sesuatu tak dijangka berlaku.

How do you carry a love that has nowhere left to go?

programme.title: Killers Five
programme.desc: A gifted archer and her team embark on a mission to rescue the Cao King's kidnapped daughter from notorious bandits.

programme.title: Asia-pol
programme.desc: Asiapol agent Yang Ming Hsuan sets out to apprehend George Eaton, a high profile thug who has escaped to Hong Kong. With home support, can Yang take him down?

programme.title: The Bells of Death
programme.desc: A man devotes his life to mastering the sword in order to exact revenge on the three men who killed his family and abducted his sister.

programme.title: Hex After Hex
programme.desc: In this comedy, hellish emotions are unleashed when a demon arranges to have his true love killed in order to possess her. Starring Lo Meng.

programme.title: Lovers Blades
programme.desc: Starring Kara Hui, Yuen Tak and Meng Yuen Man, this film depicts a series of battles as everyone fights over the 'Yuan Yang Swords', which hold the secrets to Kung Fu.

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A young woman, who has gone through life disguised as a boy, must deal with her family's pressure for her to marry and the love of another woman.

programme.title: The Proud Youth
programme.desc: This fascinating story of conflicting clans marks the beginning of Sun Chung's exploration of the kung fu genre.

programme.title: The Purple Shell
programme.desc: Adapted from Chiung Yao's novel, this romance depicts how a wealthy man and a sweet girl discover that they are soulmates too late in life.

programme.title: Twelve Deadly Coins
programme.desc: Flipping a coin' takes on a whole new meaning in this action-packed, martial arts melodrama - because the pocket change is actually deadly kung-fu weapons.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Betty Ting Pei plays a girl hiding from her father while working as a club singer in Japan. Then her father sends someone for her only for the man to fall in love with her.

programme.title: Lady of Steel
programme.desc: Kung fu queen Cheng Pei-pei plays a swordswoman on a mission to find the bandits who killed her parents and save her country from foreign invaders.

programme.title: Illicit Desire
programme.desc: Director Li Han Hsiang adapts three erotic tales from Chinese classical literature for the silver screen. Starring Tien Lie, Hu Chin and Chen Ping.

programme.title: The Bride Napping
programme.desc: Betty Loh, Grace Ting and Diana Chang star in this romantic comedy between a gifted scholar and the administrative official's daughter he falls for at first sight.

programme.title: Fangs of the Cobra
programme.desc: Follow a virtuous viper as it sniffs out bombs, fights gangs, battles a baby-killing rodent and even takes on a dangerous lady in this thriller!

programme.title: Have Sword Will Travel
programme.desc: A drifter (David Chiang) and another swordsman (Ti Lung) are competitors for a woman's love who fate turns into brothers in arms.

programme.title: The Twin Bracelets
programme.desc: Problems ensue after one of two childhood friends who have vowed to become sisters through the exchange of bracelets gets married.

programme.title: The Deadly Knives
programme.desc: Two lovers who return to announce their marriage plans discover that their families are in conflict over land. Can they mend this broken bond?

programme.title: The Mirror and the Lichee
programme.desc: The film's curious title refers to two props that signal a happy beginning to what develops into a tragic love story, linking a scholar and a local beauty.

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: This delightful action comedy featuring international favourite Alexander Fu Sheng presents a breathtaking showcase of wushu and wizardry.

programme.title: The Blue and the Black
programme.desc: A young couple's love is put to the test over a tumultuous period of Chinese history. Starring Linda Lin Dai, Kwan Shan.

programme.title: Call to Arms
programme.desc: As the aggressive Chin Empire conquers the Chao Kingdom and drains the Wei empire, adventure, intrigue and tragedy abound as the armies march into battle.

programme.title: Carry on Doctors and Nurses
programme.desc: Director Anthony Chan joins award-winning social satirist Alfred Cheung Kin Ting in this delightful variation on the hugely successful British Carry On!

programme.title: The Magnificent Ruffians
programme.desc: In this gem from Chang Cheh, it's a battle between security agencies and five powerful fighters as they brawl until the last drop of blood is spilled.

programme.title: Family Light Affair
programme.desc: Serio-comic clashes of cultures ensue when a Mainland Chinese family try to make a go of it in Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: When Kuan, a guard at the Tien Ying Treasury House, falls for his boss's granddaughter, it isn't long before he begins plotting the elimination of his rival.

programme.title: The Last Tempest
programme.desc: The court intrigues, politicking, bickering and backstabbing continues in this sequel to The Empress Dowager. Starring Lisa Lu.

programme.title: Black Magic
programme.desc: Ti Lung plays a helpless man who is under the spell of an evil witch doctor in this bone-chilling tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Vengeance Is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: In this tale of greed, lust and vengeance, only Silver Swallow can stop the golden blade.

programme.title: Dawn Will Come
programme.desc: In true Huangmei opera style, lovely Li Hsiang-chun stars as a used and abused beauty in director Kao Li's restrained, as well as sadistic tearjerker.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: Charlie Countryman
programme.desc: Charlie's deceased mum's spirit sends him to Bucharest, where he fulfils a promise to a fellow passenger who dies mid-flight.

programme.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: When a pianist and an actress follow their passion and achieve success in their respective fields, they find themselves torn between their love for each other and their careers.

programme.title: Poseidon

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A young boxer wins his debut championship and goes on to reach new heights of fame through his refusal to fight in Vietnam and other controversial actions.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: Judgement Day has occurred and Skynet has all but exterminated modern society. Now John Connor leads the resistance against Skynet but is unsure of victory until he encounters Marcus Wright.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: Three teenagers discover that their neighbour's house is actually a monster that hates children. They then decide to destroy the heart of the house and kill it.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita and Little Rock set out on a mission to protect the rest of humanity by fighting evolved zombies while also battling their own internal demons.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Prepped to be the successor of his father's drug empire, a near-death experience alters Sergei's physicality. Sergei now treads the path of vengeance as he hunts criminals.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles Morales travels the spider-verse and meets a league of spider-people as he fights a new enemy, the Spot. But upon trying to change his canon event, he is pitted against the other Spider-Men.

programme.title: Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines
programme.desc: John Connor, a cybernetic warrior from the future, travels back in time to accomplish his mission of protecting a man and his future wife, Kate, from a robotic attack.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock tries to revive his failing career by interviewing a serial killer, Cletus Kasady, who is on death row. When Carnage gains control over Cletus's body, he escapes from the prison.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Upon getting adopted by the Littles, Stuart, a mouse, is unwelcomed by his new brother George. So, when Stuart begins to feel low the family helps him find his real parents.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Count Dracula runs a high-end resort for monsters and is overprotective of his daughter, Mavis. When Johnny, a human, enters the hotel, Count Dracula tries to prevent Mavis from falling for him.
Jackson Curtis, a discontented writer, battles against all odds to keep his family secure when a series of apocalyptic calamities threaten to decimate humankind.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Norway and England meet in the FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Miami Stadium. Norway beat Brazil 2-1 behind Erling Haaland's late brace, while England defeated Mexico 3-2 behind Jude Bellingham's brace and Harry Kane's clutch penalty sealed the win.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France plays England in a Bronze Final match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. France play the Bronze Final game after losing 0-2 to Spain in the semi-finals. Anthony Gordon scored the opening goal in England's 1-2 loss to Argentina.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: USA meets Bosnia and Herzegovina in a Round of 32 game of the FIFA World Cup in San Francisco. USA finished first despite a 2-3 loss to Türkiye in the final Group D match. Bosnia and Herzegovina ranked third in Group B after a 3-1 win over Qatar.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Mexico faces England in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Mexico City Stadium. Mexico defeated Ecuador 2-0 with goals scored by Raul Jimenez and Julian Quinones. England won against Congo DR 2-1 with both goals scored by Harry Kane.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France plays England in a Bronze Final match of the FIFA World Cup at Miami Stadium. France play the Bronze Final game after losing 0-2 to Spain in the semi-finals. Anthony Gordon scored the opening goal in England's 1-2 loss to Argentina.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Argentina plays Spain in the Final match of the FIFA World Cup at New York New Jersey Stadium. Spain secured a 2-0 shutout over France to advance to the finals. Lionel Messi assisted the winning goal in Argentina's 2-1 victory over England.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Portugal plays Spain in a Round of 16 match of the FIFA World Cup at Dallas Stadium. Portugal advanced after a 2-1 win over Croatia with a penalty by Cristiano Ronaldo; Spain entered following a 3-0 shutout of Austria led by a Mikel Oyarzabal brace.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Portugal faces Croatia in a Round of 32 match of the FIFA World Cup at Toronto Stadium. Croatia finished second in Group L after beating Ghana 2-1. Portugal ranked second after playing to a 0-0 draw against Colombia in their final Group K match.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: France meets Paraguay in a World Cup Round of 16 match at Philadelphia Stadium. The 2022 runner-up dominated Sweden 3-0, with Kylian Mbappé scoring a brace. Paraguay pulled off a huge upset by beating Germany 4-3 in a penalty shoot-out to qualify.

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

programme.title: Music and Lyrics
programme.desc: Eyeing a comeback, former pop star Alex is asked to write a song for a teenage superstar. When Alex recognises house sitter Sophie's talent for words, he must convince her to help him.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five couples from Atlanta buckle up to deal with the joys and sorrows of having a baby for the first time. However, they soon realise that parenthood demands a lot more than they anticipated.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Various couples strive to overcome challenges in their personal lives, as they face highs and lows in their romantic relationships.

programme.title: Zoey's Extraordinary Christmas
programme.desc: On her first holiday without her father, Zoey wants to create a magical Christmas for her family just like the ones Mitch used to do.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The Madagascar animals crash-land in Kenya, where Alex reunites with his long-lost parents.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart gives up being an FBI field agent to become the public face of the bureau. However, when two of her friends get kidnapped in Las Vegas, she sets out to rescue them, defying direct orders.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Max, a pet dog, gets jealous when Katie, his owner, adopts another dog, Duke. However, they are forced to face challenges together when Ozone, a cat, plots to get them caught by Animal Control.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When Kiki helps facilitate a final public appearance between her famous boss and her estranged husband, she experiences an unexpected spark of attraction and falls for him.

programme.title: Surviving Christmas
programme.desc: A lonely rude millionaire bribes a family to celebrate Christmas with him.
